title: Exporting Monday_Docs
excerpt: Love the integration of docs - however there is no way to export that doc once created. Would like to see this become an option soon - building docs within the workspace is a fantastic feature but exporting all the info …

posts.author: Rayne (Shannon)
posts.cookedHtml: Love the integration of docs - however there is no way to export that doc once created. Would like to see this become an option soon - building docs within the workspace is a fantastic feature but exporting all the info contained within would be even better.

posts.author: Kamran (Kamran Sathar)
posts.cookedHtml:
We can not export and print the doc, however below issues remain

  1. Not able to print/export to pdf in landscape page layout.
  2. Not able to view full table once print/export to pdf.

Please get this resolved as we cannot share minutes with clients.
